article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC Assessment updates 2026 property values for railways, pipelines, power lines, and telecom cables
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has updated the rules used to calculate the assessed value (the official dollar value used to set property taxes) of railways, pipelines, power lines, and telecom cables in BC for 2026.
briefs.action_required: Review your 2026 BC Assessment notice to confirm your property's assessed value reflects the new rates.

key_dates.label: BC Rights of Way Valuation Regulation 2026 updated rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 243/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
